name: Chronoflow - Focus Timer
description: Minimalist focus timer for deep work and productivity

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><defs><style>.timer-bg{fill:%23ff6b6b;}.timer-inner{fill:%23ffffff;opacity:0.9;}.timer-text{font-size:80px;font-weight:bold;fill:%23ff6b6b;dominant-baseline:central;text-anchor:middle;}</style></defs><circle class='timer-bg' cx='96' cy='96' r='90'/><circle class='timer-inner' cx='96' cy='96' r='80'/><text class='timer-text' x='96' y='96'>25</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><defs><style>.timer-bg{fill:%236366f1;}.timer-ring{fill:none;stroke:%23ffffff;stroke-width:20;}.timer-text{font-size:200px;font-weight:bold;fill:%23ffffff;dominant-baseline:central;text-anchor:middle;}</style></defs><circle class='timer-bg' cx='256' cy='256' r='240'/><circle class='timer-ring' cx='256' cy='256' r='200'/><text class='timer-text' x='256' y='280'>⏱</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%2308090d' width='540' height='720'/><circle cx='270' cy='300' r='120' fill='%236366f1' opacity='0.06'/><circle cx='270' cy='300' r='100' fill='none' stroke='%236366f1' stroke-width='4'/><text x='270' y='310' font-size='60' font-weight='bold' fill='%23f4f4f5' text-anchor='middle'>25:00</text><text x='270' y='360' font-size='14' fill='%23d4d4d8' text-anchor='middle'>FOCUS SESSION</text></svg>
